mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_menu
menu_name = #{menuName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_type = #{menuType}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, permission = #{permission}, icon = #{icon}, order_num = #{orderNum}, is_frame = #{isFrame}, is_cache = #{isCache}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, create_by = #{createBy}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE permission = #{permission} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC
SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE menu_name = #{menuName} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0
